    descriptionDr. Mira: “If you want to help me uncover the truth about Azuron, it could be worth speaking to Wrengher Jones, he runs a recycle station here in Kapello. He was one of the first refugees to arrive here, however he refuses to talk to me. Perhaps you can be more persuasive?”
    mustBeInorderNo
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionWrengher Jones: “What the hell do you want? I don’t have any time if you aren’t here for business. Just get out of here already…”
